statement.headerDoc:
Erdős-Straus Conjecture — Lean 4 (Mathlib) Partial Formalization
  =================================================================

  Conjecture (Erdős-Straus 1948): For every integer n ≥ 2, there exist
  positive integers a ≤ b ≤ c with
      4/n = 1/a + 1/b + 1/c.
  Clearing denominators:
      4·a·b·c = n·(b·c + a·c + a·b).

  Status:
    - Verified empirically for n < 10^17 (Salez and others).
    - Known residue-class results close many cases.
    - Completely open in full generality.

  This file provides:
    1. A Nat-arithmetic predicate `erdosStraus n a b c`.
    2. Explicit witness

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
